certificates.title: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure 2025 Generative AI Professional
details: Integrating AI services into enterprise workflows

projects.name: Clarity – Modern Guidance, Grounded in Wisdom
projects.description: Clarity is a multilingual RAG-powered AI platform that uses semantic search and LLM reasoning to deliver Bhagavad Gita–grounded guidance for modern-life queries, featuring real-time TTS across 11 regional languages with a scalable async FastAPI + SSE streaming backend.

projects.name: Leaf Disease Detection System
projects.description: Built a hybrid deep learning model combining U2-Net and ResNet for crop disease detection and severity estimation. Achieved 96% classification accuracy and reduced misclassification rate by ~15%.

projects.name: Sanity – Real vs Fake News Detection
projects.description: AI-powered news classification system using a fine-tuned DistilBERT model. Supports text, PDF, and URL inputs with confidence threshold logic and automatic LLM fallback.

projects.name: Real-Time Multi-Object Tracking Pipeline
projects.description: End-to-end tracking pipeline using RT-DETR-R50 and ByteTrack designed specifically for Indian road environments. Detects and tracks vehicles, pedestrians, and animals with stable persistent IDs across video streams.

projects.name: Zen – Habit Tracker
projects.description: Full-stack productivity web application with gamified habit tracking. Implemented interactive 3D garden visualization using Three.js.
